title: Atelier Nova
summary: Editorial website for a creative studio, with a responsive showcase, service pages, and a contact form.
description: Atelier Nova is a web project focused on presenting visual identity and art direction services through a fast, clear, and elegant experience. The interface prioritizes readability, visual portfolio browsing, and subtle calls to contact.
highlight: Simple architecture ready for publishing on a VPS or Render.

title: Green Panel
summary: Lightweight dashboard for tracking environmental indicators with cards, filters, and clear metric views.
description: Green Panel organizes consumption, savings, and impact indicators in a direct screen for recurring use. The goal was to reduce friction when reading data while keeping the interface flexible enough for new metrics.
highlight: Scan-friendly design without cluttering the screen.

title: Lumina Brand
summary: Visual identity for a handcrafted lighting brand, including logo, palette, and digital assets.
description: Lumina Brand explores contrast, typographic composition, and a visual system that is easy to apply across social media, packaging, and presentation materials.
highlight: Consistent graphic system built with a small set of elements.

title: Ritmo Posters
summary: Poster series for a cultural event with modular composition, strong colors, and digital adaptations.
description: The Ritmo series was designed to work both in print and digital announcements. Its modular system makes variations easy without losing visual recognition.
highlight: Flexible visual grid for multiple pieces.
